title: Connect boards , contacts as the main item

posts.author: goldman (chen goldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

i am using the monday CRM.
i want to use the conacts board to create a new board where i will manage my sales partners, and use differnt items than the original ocntacts board has… i want the contacts to be themain item of the board. i managed to set up a connect board for the contacts name but only as a second item , not main.

is there a way to do that ?
thanks
chen

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @goldman ,
Create a New Board: Set up a new board to manage sales partners

  • Add a “Connect Boards” column.
  • Link it to your Contacts board.
  • Make Contacts the Main Item:
    • The linked contact will be the main item in the new board.
    • Add other details like sales performance or contact info in separate columns.
  • Customize Your Board: Add columns for other sales-related info (e.g., deals, status).

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic

posts.author: goldman (chen goldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Zaki

Appriciate your reply! still, im not sure i was clear enough.
please have a look at my screenshot

image947×476 26.2 KB

i made a new board and could it “partner”, then added connect board of CONTACTS. however, i want to make the connect board column instead of the “partner” column.
is that possible?
thanks!
chen

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There’s no way to have a ‘Connected’ column be the first column of the board. Can you just create another contacts board and rename it to?

posts.author: goldman (chen goldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Desiree

CRM’s contacts board can not be duplicated . so opening a new contacts board, i wont have access to my crm’s contacts.
will have to think of differnt fomat where contacts would be 2nd column

thanks!

chen

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml: You could use an automation to rename the item so it matches the name of the contact (tools like Formula Automations or General Caster would allow you to do this).
